bead.title: Define release contract and reproducible local command surface
bead.description: Implement the base contract from docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md before release publishing work. Current repo evidence: Cargo.toml repository is https://github.com/heimq/heimq but origin is https://github.com/easel/heimq; there is no rust-toolchain.toml; there is no justfile or Makefile; Dockerfile uses rust:1.85-bookworm; workflows use dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable. In-scope files: Cargo.toml, rust-toolchain.toml, Dockerfile, justfile or Makefile, docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Required decisions: canonical repository is easel/heimq; Rust toolchain pin is 1.85.1 with clippy/rustfmt; release tag mapping is vX.Y.Z -> binary X.Y.Z -> Docker vX.Y.Z/X.Y.Z/X.Y/X -> Helm chart version X.Y.Z and appVersion X.Y.Z. Out of scope: GitHub Release creation, Docker publishing workflow, Helm publishing workflow, README, microsite.
bead.acceptance:
1. `grep -Fq 'channel = "1.85.1"' rust-toolchain.toml` passes and rust-toolchain.toml includes clippy and rustfmt.
2. `grep -Fq 'repository = "https://github.com/easel/heimq"' Cargo.toml` passes.
3. `grep -Fq 'rust:1.85.1-bookworm' Dockerfile` passes or Dockerfile documents an equivalent digest-pinned builder image.
4. `just --list` or `make -n ci` shows fmt, clippy, test, ci, docker-build, helm-check, bench-smoke, and parity targets.
5. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
6. `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
7. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes.
8. `helm lint charts/heimq` and `helm template heimq charts/heimq` pass.
